case_title: MACADAM COMPUTER, INC VS DEPENDABLE HIGHWAY EXPRESS

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DEPENDABLE HIGHWAY EXPRESS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT DEPENDABLE HIGHWAY EXPRESS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT MACADAM COMPUTER, INC PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF MACADAM COMPUTER, INC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,282.00 FILED BY MACADAM COMPUTER, INC AS TO DEFENDANT DEPENDABLE HIGHWAY EXPRESS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-17-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY DEPENDABLE HIGHWAY EXPRESS AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT MACADAM COMPUTER, INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-17-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MACADAM COMPUTER, INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEPENDABLE HIGHWAY EXPRESS $3,282.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,372.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
